---
title: "Data story telling"
author: "Gemma Bargalló Solé"
date: "2026-04-29"
output: html_document
---

# 1. Data Import

```{r}
# Final dataset import
wfc_final2 <- read_csv(here("Data", "wfc_final2.csv"))

```


```{r}
# MAP

# Load libraries
library(leaflet)
library(dplyr)
library(crosstalk)

# 1. Data Preparation
wfc_map_data <- wfc_final2 %>%
  mutate(
    # Ensure year is a factor for the dropdown selector
    year_factor = as.factor(year),
    # Create the customized popup text in English
    popup_text = paste0(
      "<div style='font-family: Arial; font-size: 12px;'>",
      "<strong>Municipality:</strong> ", municipio, "<br>",
      "<strong>Year:</strong> ", year, "<br>",
      "<strong>Burnt Surface:</strong> ", superficie_total_forestal, " ha<br>",
      "<strong>Land Cover ID:</strong> ", land_cover_id, "<br>",
      "<strong>Cause:</strong> ", causa, "</div>"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(longitude, latitude, year_factor, popup_text, superficie_total_forestal, municipio)

# 2. Create SharedData object
sd <- SharedData$new(wfc_map_data)

# 3. Map layout with single year filter
bscols(
  widths = c(12),
  # Year selector (dropdown)
  filter_select(
    id = "year_selector", 
    label = "Select a specific year to visualize wildfires:", 
    sharedData = sd, 
    group = ~year_factor,
    multiple = FALSE  # Ensures only one year is shown at a time
  ),
  # Leaflet Map with light background
  leaflet(sd, width = "100%", height = 650) %>%
    addTiles() %>% 
    addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) %>% # Clean white/light background
    addCircleMarkers(
      lng = ~longitude, 
      lat = ~latitude,
      radius = ~sqrt(superficie_total_forestal) + 3, 
      color = "#E44D2E",
      stroke = TRUE,
      weight = 1,
      fillOpacity = 0.7,
      popup = ~popup_text,
      label = ~paste(municipio, "-", superficie_total_forestal, "ha") # Hover label
    )
)
```
